events.title: As warheads proliferate, decades old nuclear weapons treaty must evolve, warns UN chief
events.summary: With top diplomats gathered at UN Headquarters to review the 1970 Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons (NPT), the UN Secretary-General warned that it must evolve to survive the age of AI and other new technologies.

events.title: Central Sahel: Millions of children in humanitarian need, UNICEF official warns
events.summary: Nearly 7.5 million children across the Central Sahel region in Africa are in urgent need of humanitarian assistance – “an emergency that remains too far from the attention of the international community,” a senior official with the UN chil...

events.title: MIDDLE EAST LIVE 27 April: Everyone’s paying the price for Hormuz closure, Guterres warns Security Council
events.summary: The recently extended ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon remains under strain as violence continues, with civilian deaths and injuries reported in Israeli strikes over the weekend. Meanwhile, the Security Council is debating maritime sec...

events.title: Chokepoints and conflict: How the Hormuz crisis is exposing global shipping vulnerabilities
events.summary: The blockading of ships in the Strait of Hormuz as a result of the conflict between the United States and Iran has demonstrated how ships and seafarers have become “leverage in geopolitical disputes,” according to the head of the UN’s Inte...

events.title: Mali: Guterres calls for international solutions to curb spread of violent extremism in the Sahel
events.summary: There are reports of continuing clashes in Mali on Sunday, a day after a series of coordinated attacks across the landlocked African nation against Government forces by extremists and northern separatist rebels.
